name: Vault E2E Test Butterfly
core_insight: Testing the vault commit round-trip — this is a test entry.
thesis: A test entry to verify the Vault sync layer works end-to-end.
bar_stool: We need to make sure when you save something here, it shows up in the Vault and can be committed to GitHub.
one_liner: A test entry to verify the Vault sync layer works end-to-end.
